name: Unified Needs Assessment Library
description: Per-question library of needs-assessment fields, classed by solution type. Replaces the four per-solution-type JSON files (ucaas, ccaas, virtual_agent, ci). Combo solutions render the union of their solution types' questions; shared questions appear once. v1.1.0 applies a trim pass: ~23 questions removed or consolidated (within-section duplicates, fields covered by the customer record, CI customizations collapsed to a single multi-select, current-platform fragmentation merged). The 'other_journeys' file remains separate and is layered on as an opt-in adjacent-technology discovery overlay.

questions.label: What type of project is this?
Current platform being replaced or expanded (leave blank if new deployment)
questions.description: Capture the existing phone / contact center / sales platform that is being replaced, expanded, or migrated from.

ucaas.label: Prepare for future CCaaS / platform convergence

questions.description: Examples of useful baselines: current call/chat volume, containment rate, CSAT.
